    ⚔️🏴‍☠️ New Arrival: ONE PIECE CARD OP-16 The Time of Battle 🏴‍☠️⚔️ The brand-new OP-16 The Time of Battle has officially arrived at FUJI CARD SHOP! 🎉🔥 This time, the set is themed around the legendary Marineford War (Summit War Arc) — one of the most emotional and iconic moments in the entire ONE PIECE story. 🌊⚓ ✨ The headline chase cards are the stunning Manga Art Rares of the Three Admirals: 🔥 Sakazuki (Akainu) ❄️ Kuzan (Aokiji) 💡 Borsalino (Kizaru) In addition, the set features amazing Alt Art cards of fan-favorite characters including: 🏴‍☠️ Luffy 🔥 Ace 🌹 Miss All Sunday (Nico Robin) 💖 Boa Hancock ⚔️ Tashigi The artwork in this set is absolutely incredible, and it's a must-have for both collectors and players! 🎨✨ 📦 We are currently shipping pre-orders in the order they were placed, and most orders are already on their way! 🚚💨 📦 We still have additional stock available, so if you're looking to add OP-16 to your collection, now is a great time to order! 🛒✨ Thank you as always for your continued support! ❤️🙏 We couldn't do this without all of you! #OnePieceCardGame #OP16 #TheTimeOfBattle #Marineford #SummitWar #Akainu #Aokiji #Kizaru #Ace #Luffy #BoaHancock #MangaRare #AltArt #OnePieceTCG #FujiCardShop #JapaneseTCG #TradingCards #CardCollector 🏴‍☠️✨
    🌑✨ New Arrival! Pokémon Card M5 – Abyss Eye ✨🌑 The brand new M5 Abyss Eye has officially arrived at FUJI CARD SHOP! 🔥 This set is centered around the mysterious and powerful Mega Darkrai, and it’s already becoming one of the most talked-about releases! The stunning Mega Darkrai MUR & SAR cards look incredible, and the set also features awesome Mega Evolution Pokémon like Mega Zeraora and Mega Chandelure ⚡👻 Fan-favorite Pokémon like Morpeko are included too! For Trainer cards, we’re excited to see characters like Misty and Gwynn, and personally, I really love the artwork on the Slowbro AR and Goldeen AR 🎨🐟 📦 We are currently shipping pre-orders in the order they were placed. 📦 We still have stock available, and more inventory is planned to arrive soon, so feel free to place your order anytime! Thank you as always for your continued support 🙏💖 #PokemonCards #AbyssEye #MegaDarkrai #PokemonTCG #MegaEvolution #MUR #SAR #Misty #Slowbro #FujiCardShop #JapanesePokemonCards
    ✨ New Arrival Alert! ✨ The brand-new Pokémon Card M4 Ninja Spinner is now in stock! 🎴🥷 ――――――――――――――――――― This set is centered around Mega Greninja — and it does NOT disappoint! 🐸💙 Highlights include: 🌟 Mega Greninja MUR & SAR 🌸 Mega Florges 🐉 Mega Goodra 🐾 Cinccino ⚡ Ampharos AR 🌈 Xerneas AR Personally, I'm a huge fan of the Ampharos AR and Xerneas AR artwork — they are absolutely gorgeous! 🎨✨ ――――――――――――――――――― 📦 Pre-orders are currently being shipped out! If you've reserved yours, it's on its way! ――――――――――――――――――― We still have stock available, and more inventory is arriving soon — so feel free to place your order anytime! 🛒 As always, thank you so much for your incredible support! 🙏❤️ ――――――――――――――――――― #PokemonCards #M4NinjaSpinner #MegaGreninja #NewArrival #PokemonTCG #ポケモンカード #Greninja #MegaEvolution #PokemonCollection #CardCollector
    ⚡🏝️ New Arrival! ONE PIECE CARD OP-15 – Adventure on KAMI’s Island 🏝️⚡ OP-15 has officially arrived at FUJI CARD SHOP! This time, the set takes us back to the legendary Skypiea Arc — a fan-favorite storyline filled with epic battles and unforgettable moments. The highlight of this release is the Manga Art Rare Enel ⚡🔥 We’re also loving the beautiful Devil Fruit background Alt Art cards, featuring Hancock, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Enel, Sabo, and more. The artwork in this set is truly impressive! 📦 We are currently shipping pre-orders in the order they were placed. 📦 Additional stock is available, so feel free to place your order while supplies last!
